creator: fjoe@FreeBSD.org
text:
With the help from glebius@, kib@ and afedorov@ the root cause has been identified to be this: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=269823

The patch (https://reviews.freebsd.org/D38898) resolves the issue with inpcb leak in 13-STABLE (and with user processes stuck on close(2) in 14-CURRENT).

The symptom (without the patch) is as follows:

--- top -HSP ---
